description: You are a Senior Financial Analyst at Meridian Retail Group. The CFO has requested a Profit & Loss Attribution Dashboard to support the upcoming board presentation using order data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\order_lines.csv. Create an Oracle Analytics workbook named 'pl_attribution' containing three canvases: 'Segment Profitability' (analyzing total Sales and Profit by Customer Segment), 'Category Margin Analysis' (analyzing total Sales and profit margin by Product Category using a calculated column 'Profit_Margin_Pct' defined as Profit / Sales * 100), and 'Unit Economics' (analyzing Product Category and Customer Segment economics using a calculated column 'Net_Profit_Per_Unit' defined as Profit / Quantity Ordered). All canvases must use the order_lines dataset. Save the final workbook as 'pl_attribution.dva' to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\.
